title: Implement comprehensive GNSS and time synchronization simulation for Renode
description: Add support for GNSS peripherals in Renode models for T-Echo (u-blox), T1000-E (LR1110+AG3335). Include build-time epoch stamping, NMEA sentence generation in sim, integration with SenML and RPL time. Parallel test development. Update docs/renode-workflow.md and test suite.
